calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Set For Trial On Jun-30-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MICHAEL ELKIN, Esq. of Elkin Gamboa, LLP (tel: 323-372-1202) for Plaintiff.
Atty. ADAM ARCE, Esq. of Ferber Law, APC (tel: 925-355-9800) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT DEGRACIA PARTNERS, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DeGracia Partners, Inc.'s motion to strike is denied. Factual bases for punitive damages are adequately alleged for the pleading stage. (See, e.g., Compt. 6:18-8:10; Civ. Code 3294.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MICHAEL ELKIN, Esq. of Elkin Gamboa, LLP (tel: 323-372-1202) for Plaintiff.
Atty. ADAM ARCE, Esq. of Ferber Law, APC (tel: 925-355-9800) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT DEGRACIA PARTNERS, INC. DBA PACIFIC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DeGracia Partners, Inc.'s demurrer is overruled. Failure to provide required rest periods (9), failure to reimburse necessary expenditures (16) and failure to permit inspection of personnel records (17) are adequately alleged for the pleading stage. (Cmplt. 20:7-17, 26:1-26.) Particularity is not required; the facts can be developed in discovery.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
